mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_audit_log ( tenant_id, trace_id, conversation_id, actor_type, actor_id, action, resource_type, resource_id, request_json, response_json, duration_ms, status, ip_address, user_agent, created_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{traceId}, #{conversationId}, #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{action}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{requestJson}, #{responseJson}, #{durationMs}, #{status}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_audit_log WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
